blockers.reason: OPL hosted visual-stage long soak has not produced live provider restart, re-query, retry, dead-letter, owner receipt, or no-regression evidence.
RCA exposes locator, workspace receipt inventory, and memory/lifecycle ref models, but this repo does not track live receipt instance bodies or claim scaleout receipt instances are complete.
RCA exposes repeated no-regression refs for ppt_deck and xiaohongshu, but those refs are not production soak completion evidence across repeated family runs.
